overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city. The journey transitions from a sunny commercial sidewalk with prominent advertising billboards into a shaded urban canyon beneath an elevated highway, showcasing the game's cyberpunk aesthetic with high-contrast lighting and dense urban architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with food vendors and neon advertising

events.description: turning right at the intersection to follow the street perpendicular to the initial direction

agents.ego_description: walking along a busy commercial sidewalk and turning right at an intersection while following a pedestrian with purple hair

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with purple hair walking ahead of the player character
man in brown leather outfit walking alongside the player

entered.detail: large red neon sign for Foodscape restaurant mounted on building facade
red neon sign for Kiroshi Foods
large digital billboard displaying a blue guitar advertisement
white sign with panda logo for Nicola
food vendor cart with orange containers on the sidewalk
massive concrete elevated highway structure visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny commercial sidewalk in a futuristic city, following a pedestrian with purple hair past food vendors and bright neon signage. The Foodscape and Kiroshi Foods signs dominate the view as the character walks forward, then turns right at an intersection around the 5-second mark, continuing along the busy street.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection crossing approaching shaded corridor

events.description: stepping off the sidewalk onto the crosswalk to cross the street
entering the deep shadow cast by the elevated highway structure ahead

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and turning right into the entrance of a shaded urban corridor beneath the elevated highway

entered.detail: red and white painted pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
small yellow ticket booth or information stand on the street corner

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the sunlit street at a crosswalk, passing a yellow kiosk on the corner. As they turn right and approach the elevated highway, the lighting dramatically shifts to deep shadow around the 18-second mark, signaling the transition into the covered urban canyon ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway with neon advertising

events.description: fully entering the covered urban canyon beneath the elevated highway structure
passing beneath large cylindrical pipes with colorful holographic patterns

agents.ego_description: walking through the neon-lit urban canyon beneath the elevated highway, passing various storefronts and holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: child in blue shirt running ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: green neon sign with the word OPEN and a directional arrow
massive cylindrical structures with colorful iridescent patterns suspended overhead
glowing holographic advertisement attached to the highway support structure
orange and silver safety railings along the street edge
red neon signage for Steam shop

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place in a dark, enclosed urban canyon beneath the elevated highway, where neon signs and holographic advertisements provide the primary illumination. The character walks beneath massive cylindrical pipes with iridescent patterns, passing glowing storefronts including a green neon OPEN sign, while the highway structure looms directly overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant commercial district that gradually descends into a shadowed, neon-lit urban canyon. It begins on a sunny sidewalk, following a purple-haired pedestrian past bright Foodscape and Kiroshi Foods signage before turning right at a busy intersection. As the character crosses the sunlit street and passes a yellow kiosk, the camera tracks them toward an elevated highway where the bright daylight dramatically shifts into deep shadow. The scene then opens into a dark, enclosed corridor beneath the highway structure, where the primary light comes from holographic advertisements and glowing storefronts. Finally, the camera moves past iridescent cylindrical pipes and a green neon open sign, fully immersed in the high-contrast atmosphere of the covered city street.
